1. Mission & Scope
Mission: "Map the Road"
The primary mission of the Dependency Analysis (DA) team is to enable data-driven decisions regarding the organization’s technical stack (source). The initiative addresses the problem that while the organization has built "too many routes" to planetary-scale outcomes, there is no "measurable map" to guide teams optimally (Dependency Analysis - ...).

Technical Roadmap Report (TRR) Principles
1. Introduction
The Problem
Infrastructure fragmentation at the organization often persists not due to a lack of technical skill, but because of good-faith disagreements between experts on which solution is best (TRR Principles).
What is a TRR?
A Technical Roadmap Report (TRR) is a document designed to propose a plan to solve a specific cross-organizational technical problem which doesn’t already have a well-established solution (TRR Principles). The rep

Unified ROI Framework: Foundational Report
1. Framework Deconstruction
Mission & Core Value
The Unified ROI Framework aims to establish a consistent, VP-reviewed financial framework for the Office of [ORG_UNIT] ([TEAM_NAME]) and Core Finance (source). Its primary goal is to address the lack of a standardized method for evaluating technical initiatives, enabling:

	•	Data-driven prioritization of engineering investments (source).

Smart Brevity Rules — Internal Comms Agent Knowledge Base
Purpose: This document teaches the agent how to revise internal communications using Smart Brevity methodology, and how to explain each edit to AI-skeptical users.

Core Principle: Every revision must include a rationale. Users need to understand WHY a change was made, not just WHAT changed.

Touch Level Definitions
Low Touch
What it is: Async revision work with rationale. No meeting required.

Agent action: Handle autonomously — review materials, apply revisions, provide rationale for every change, deliver via email/doc.
